urdu transliteration text: Kabhi Najaf se, kabhi Karbala se milti haiKaha yeh Haq ne taraqqi dua se milti hai
english translation text:
I often find it from Najaf and often from Karbala,
Indeed success comes from supplication (via Ahlul Bayt a.s.)

urdu transliteration text: Hamein to baagh e risaalat ke phool ki khushbuQasam khuda ki, Hadith e kisaa se milti hai
english translation text:
We smell the fragrance of the flower of Prophethood,
By God, every time we hear the Hadith e Kisaa

urdu transliteration text: Madad khuda se, sar-e- janamaz mangta hoonTo phir madad mujhe mushkil-kusha se milti hai
english translation text:
On the prayer mat I ask God for help,
And then I get help from the one who solves all the problems (Ali a.s.)

urdu transliteration text: Galey lagaa ke jise bhai keh rahe hain HussainYeh Hur nahi hai, fanaa hai baqaa se milti hai
english translation text:
As Hussain (a.s.) welcomes him with an embrace,
This is not just Hur, it is mortality that meets immortality.

urdu transliteration text:
Barey ameer hain aise faqeer dunya meinKe jin ko bheek dar-e sayyada se milti hai
Indeed those beggars are very wealthy,
english translation text: The ones who get charity from the house of Zahra (s.a.)

urdu transliteration text: Ali ke ishq mein Rehan, izzat o shohratZahe-naseeb, mujhe Fatima se milti hai
english translation text: Love of Ali (a.s.) has brought Rehan (the poet) respect & fame,Because his destiny is blessed by Fatima (s.a).

urdu transliteration text: AbuTurab hain, aisi Turab dein ge AliHar aik zarre mein sau aftab deinge Ali
english translation text:
The title of Ali (a.s.)is AbuTurab (father of the soil), he will grant the best of soil (grave),
Every particle (of my grave) will shine like a hundred Sun

urdu transliteration text: Lahad mein mujh se nakeerain jab kareinge savaalMain kuchh na boloon ga, khud hi javaab dein ge Ali
english translation text:
When the angels come to question me in my grave,
I shall not speak, Ali (a.s.) will (inshaAllah) answer on my behalf

urdu transliteration text: Wohi sajaaye ga Abbas ka alam ghar perJise wafa ka mukammal nisaab deinge Ali
english translation text:
They can only adorn the home with the flag of Abbas,
If Ali (a.s.) gives them the certificate of faithfulness

urdu transliteration text: Khuda ki hamd, Muhammad ki naat likhoon gaKarein gi Zehra shafa'at, savaab deinge Ali.
english translation text: I shall write the praise of God and the eulogy of Muhammad (pbuh),Zahra (s.a.) shall intercede for me and Ali (a.s.) shall reward me.
